title: crotalaria bamendae
intro: Crotalaria bamendae, also known as Bamenda rattlebox or Bamenda crotalaria, is a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa. It is a shrub-like herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been found to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and even have potential antimalarial effects. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Crotalaria bamendae are typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a decoction to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
